features: The shower gel comes in a recyclable bottle.
♦Water and naturally sourced ingredients with limited processing.
description: Product Description CONNECT TO NATURE: Palmolive Thermal Spa Pampering Oil Shower Gel with macadamia oil, is beautifully fragrant and delightfully textured to help you feel more connected to nature. THOUGHTFUL: This shower gel is a little more thoughtful with ingredients of 95% natural origin ♦ and a 98% biodegradable formula. 100% NATURAL ESSENTIAL OIL: The shower gel contains 100% natural essential oil for a shower experience that’ll leave you feeling pampered. RECYCLABLE: The shower gel comes in a recyclable bottle. ♦ Water and naturally sourced ingredients with limited processing. Ingredients Aqua, Sodium Laureth Sulfate, Sodium Chloride, Cocamidopropyl Betaine, Glycerin, Parfum, Citric Acid, Sodium Benzoate, Trisodium Ethylenediamine Disuccinate, Macadamia Integrifolia Seed Oil, Citrus Aurantium Dulcis Peel Oil, Juniperus Mexicana Oil, Alpha-Isomethyl Ionone, Amyl Cinnamal, Benzyl Benzoate, Coumarin, Hexyl Cinnamal, CI 16255, CI 19140.
